title: ED procedure note documentation prompt
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documentation of consent, site verification, proposed procedure and approach, team communication, checklist use and monitoring requirements.
assessment.rationale: The exact RCEM procedure-safety section supports documenting patient concerns, clinician risk context, procedure-related assessment, severity, appearance, clinician plan, specialist discussion, completed consent and post-procedure handover only when applicable; it does not select a procedure.

source.title: Invasive Procedures in the Emergency Department
source.jurisdiction: United Kingdom emergency medicine; UAE consent, capacity and procedural policy govern local use
source.population: Adults and children undergoing invasive or high-risk procedures in an emergency department.
source.setting: Emergency-department invasive-procedure consent, site verification, team briefing, checklist, monitoring and audit.
source.exclusions: Exact for recording consent or why it was not possible, site verification where applicable, the proposed procedure and approach, team awareness, post-procedure monitoring and checklist use. It does not authorize or select a procedure.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documentation of consent, site verification, proposed procedure and approach, team communication, checklist use and monitoring requirements.

assessment.text: Supports documenting consent or the reason consent was impossible, site verification and sedation-proforma use when applicable.
assessment.rationale: The exact audit section supports recording a completed procedure report and measured or reviewed data only when performed; it does not imply successful completion.
